steps.title: Compare both areas
steps.content: The student wants a size comparison between the Peloncillo-Pan Duro Mountains and the Sierrita Mountains. The relevant notes give their areas: 1,360 square miles and 63 square miles, which enables a direct comparison.

steps.title: Require a direct comparison
steps.content: A gives a broad regional fact. C makes a vague claim about sky islands. D describes the ranges as isolated environments, not their sizes. The sentence that names both areas and says which range is larger accomplishes the goal. The answer is B.
